metadata.title: Kids Club Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Are you still not 12 years old? Then Meezan Bank has something very special for you; a chance of having your own Mudarabah-based Meezan Kids Club Account. You can now put all your pocket money, Eidi and all your other cash in this account, where it will be safe and invested in line with Islamic principles. When you get this account opened, you will get to learn a lot more about managing your savings. We will also make sure you have fun while learning to save the right way.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Meezan Kids Club Account Open a Kids Club Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print It’s Never too Early to Save! Are you still not 12 years old? Then Meezan Bank has something very special for you; a chance of having your own Mudarabah-based Meezan Kids Club Account. You can now put all your pocket money, Eidi and all your other cash in this account, where it will be safe and invested in line with Islamic principles.When you get this account opened, you will get to learn a lot more about managing your savings. We will also make sure you have fun while learning to save the right way. Key Features Personalized Chequebook Issuance of chequebook in accordance with the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Free Pay Orders Free Pay Orders Minimium Investment Open your account with Rs 500/- only Profit Higher Expected Returns Age Group Specifically for kids under the age of 12 years Great Gifts Exciting gifts*** on account opening Halal Profits Halal profit every month Personalized Debit Card Free* Visa** Debit Card in different colors for boys and girls Internet and Online Banking Free Online Banking service and Internet Banking facility SMS Alerts SMS alerts on your transactions Upgrade Account Upgrade to a Meezan Teens Club Account after your 12th birthday * FREE for first issuance only Annual fee for subsequent years will be applicable as per SOC ** Paypak Card also available on this account, however charges as per SOC *** Gifts on account opening are subject to availability. Meezan Bank doesn't have any binding obligation to provide the gifts in case of unavailability. How the Kids Club Account Works Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Kids Club Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Kids Club Account Monthly 0.45 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Club Account Monthly 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to Kids Club Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
